compounds.frequency: once daily at night, 2-3 hours fasted after last meal
1x daily in the morning when stacked with Tesa

protocol_notes: Recommends 4-8 weeks off between cycles and checking IGF-1, fasting glucose, A1C, lipids before starting new cycle. CJC/Ipa dosing: 200mcg per peptide (400mcg total if a blend), 1-2x daily; only 1x daily if also on Tesa. Takes Tesa at night fasted 2-3 hours post last meal; CJC/Ipa in the morning fasted up to 2 hours.
